headline: Waters Launches New Tools As Investors Weigh Biologics And Battery Upside
summary: Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) has launched new analytical instrument platforms and workflow solutions, including BioResolve Peptide and GTxResolve Lipid Columns. The company also introduced new high-performance mass spectrometry systems that support biopharmaceutical development, multiomics research, and battery safety testing. These products are aimed at improving characterization of complex biologics and lipids, speeding structural omics analysis, advancing imaging for translational...

headline: 1 Healthcare Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Players catalyzing medical advancements have benefited from elevated demand, which has supported the industry’s returns lately - over the past six months, healthcare stocks have gained 6.4%, nearly mirroring the S&P 500.
